Reasoning
Q1
Study the information given below carefully
and answer the following question.
An uncertain number of people are seated in a
row facing north. S is seated fourth from the left
end. M is seated fourth to the right of S. Three
people are seated between M and D. L is seated
second to the left of G. P sits exactly between S
and M. O is seated fourth to the left of L. A is
seated at the one of the extreme ends of the
row. Three people are seated between D and O.
K is seated second to the right of M. E is seated
exactly between K and D. No one is seated to the
right of G.
Who is seated seventh to the right of A?
(A) K
(B) M
(C) L
(D) O
(E) None of these
Q2
Study the information given below carefully
and answer the following question.
An uncertain number of people are seated in a
row facing north. S is seated fourth from the left
end. M is seated fourth to the right of S. Three
people are seated between M and D. L is seated
second to the left of G. P sits exactly between S
and M. O is seated fourth to the left of L. A is
seated at the one of the extreme ends of the
row. Three people are seated between D and O.
K is seated second to the right of M. E is seated
exactly between K and D. No one is seated to the
right of G.
How many people can sit to the left of E?
(A) 9
(B) 12
(C) 10
(D) 15
(E) None of these

Q6
Study the questions based on the information
given below.
A certain number of people standing in a line
facing north.There are only four people standing
between K and L. L stands to the right of P, who
stand third to the right of M. There are only three
people standing between K and M. J is the only
neighbor of L. O stands fourth to the right of Q.
Minimum two people standing between J and O.
M standing at the extreme left end of the line.
Three person standing between P and N, who
stands near to R. S is one of the people.
How many people are standing in a line?
(A) 9
(B) 8
(C) 10
(D) 11
(E) None of these

person standing between P and N, who stands

Q8
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine people C, Z, H, W, M, K, S, Q, and F are
seated in a straight line facing North but not
necessarily in the same order. W and H are sitting
at the extreme ends. C is seated second to the
left of H. S is seated third to the right of M.
Neither of the two people seated between K and
H is M or S. H and F are not neighbors. Q is
seated third to the right of W.
How many persons are seated between M and Z?
(A) 1
(B) 3
(C) 5
(D) 4
(E) 2
Q9
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine people C, Z, H, W, M, K, S, Q, and F are
seated in a straight line facing North but not
necessarily in the same order. W and H are sitting
at the extreme ends. C is seated second to the
left of H. S is seated third to the right of M.
Neither of the two people seated between K and

H is M or S. H and F are not neighbors. Q is
seated third to the right of W.
What is the position of F with respect to K?
(A) Second to the right
(B) Third to the right
(C) Second to the left
(D) Third to the left
(E) None of these
Q10
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine people C, Z, H, W, M, K, S, Q, and F are
seated in a straight line facing North but not
necessarily in the same order. W and H are sitting
at the extreme ends. C is seated second to the
left of H. S is seated third to the right of M.
Neither of the two people seated between K and
H is M or S. H and F are not neighbors. Q is
seated third to the right of W.
Which among the following statement is true
according to the given arrangement?
(A) Two people sit to the left of M
(B) H is seated second to right of S
(C) K and Z are neighbors
(D) Only person is seated to the right of Z
(E) None of these
Q11
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.

seated in a straight line facing North but not

and C?
(A) W
(B) Z
(C) K
(D) F
(E) None of these
Q12
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine people are sitting in a straight line. Some of
them are facing the north and some are facing
the south direction. The neighbors of W face the
opposite direction of W. R sits second to the right
of N. Three people sit between V and L. D sits
second to the right of Q, who face the opposite
direction of Z. Z sits third to the right of R. V sits
third to the left of N, who is not facing the south
direction. L sits third to the right of W. W sits in
the middle. P and Q face the opposite directions.
More than two people sit to the right of D, who
face the opposite direction of L.
Four from the following are similar in a certain
way and forms a group. Find out the one, which
does not belong to that group.
(A) Z, N
(B) V, W
(C) Q, P
(D) P, D
(E) L, R
Q13
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine people are sitting in a straight line. Some of
them are facing the north and some are facing
the south direction. The neighbors of W face the
opposite direction of W. R sits second to the right
of N. Three people sit between V and L. D sits
second to the right of Q, who face the opposite
direction of Z. Z sits third to the right of R. V sits
third to the left of N, who is not facing the south
direction. L sits third to the right of W. W sits in
the middle. P and Q face the opposite directions.
More than two people sit to the right of D, who
face the opposite direction of L.
How many people sit to the left of D?
(A) 5
(B) 3
(C) 2
(D) 6
(E) 1

Q20
Direction : A certain number of people are sitting
in a row facing the north direction. Three people
are sitting between G and V. J sits fifth to the
right of O. M sits third to the left of K. More than
10 people are sitting between M and J. Six
people are sitting between V and M. Eight people
are sitting between J and K. V sits fourth from an
end.
How many people are sitting between G and K?
(A) 7
(B) 4
(C) 6
(D) 5
(E) 8
Q21
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine friends Tina, Parul, Anjali, Charu, Kritika,
Sanjana, Khushi, Vanika, and Tanya are sitting in a
straight line facing to the north but not
necessarily in the same order. Sanjana sits at the
extreme end of the row. Three persons sit
between Sanjana and Khushi. Parul is seated
exactly between Sanjana and Vanika. Vanika sits
left of Khushi. Parul does not sit to the right of
Khushi. Tanya is the only immediate neighbor of
Kritika. More than one person sits between Tina
and Charu who does not sit near Khushi.
 
Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way and hence form a group. Find out the one
that does not belong to that group.
(A) Sanjana - Vanika
(B) Tina - Anjali
(C) Vanika - Charu
(D) Charu - Kritika
(E) Parul - Tina
Q22
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine friends Tina, Parul, Anjali, Charu, Kritika,
Sanjana, Khushi, Vanika, and Tanya are sitting in a
straight line facing to the north but not
necessarily in the same order. Sanjana sits at the
extreme end of the row. Three persons sit
between Sanjana and Khushi. Parul is seated
exactly between Sanjana and Vanika. Vanika sits
left of Khushi. Parul does not sit to the right of
Khushi. Tanya is the only immediate neighbor of
Kritika. More than one person sits between Tina
and Charu who does not sit near Khushi.
 
How many persons are seated between Parul
and Charu?
(A) Three
(B) Four
(C) Five
(D) Six
(E) None of these

extreme ends?
(A) Parul - Khushi
(B) Tina - Anjali
(C) Vanika - Tanya
(D) Sanjana - Kritika
(E) None of these
Q24
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine friends Tina, Parul, Anjali, Charu, Kritika,
Sanjana, Khushi, Vanika, and Tanya are sitting in a
straight line facing to the north but not
necessarily in the same order. Sanjana sits at the

left of Khushi. Parul does not sit to the right of
Khushi. Tanya is the only immediate neighbor of
Kritika. More than one person sits between Tina
and Charu who does not sit near Khushi.
 
Which of the following statement is true
regarding Vanika?
(A) Vanika is seated third from the left end
(B) Vanika is seated exactly between Parul and
Tina
(C) Vanika is seated third to the left of Anjali
(D) All are true
(E) None of these

Nine friends Tina, Parul, Anjali, Charu, Kritika,
Sanjana, Khushi, Vanika, and Tanya are sitting in a

necessarily in the same order. Sanjana sits at the

Who among the following is seated second to
the left of Khushi?
(A) Parul
(B) Tina
(C) Vanika
(D) Tanya
(E) None of these
Q26
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q and R are
sitting in a straight row but not in the same order.
Some of them are facing south and others facing
north direction. Not more than two adjacent
persons face in the same direction. J sits 4 from
one of the extreme ends. K sits 5 to the right of
J. Two persons sit between K and N and both K
and N are facing towards the north. One person
sits between N and P, who sits to the immediate
left of Q. R sits third to the right of P, who faces
south. O sits to the immediate left of both L and
J. M and R face the same direction.
 
Find the odd one.
(A) M
(B) L
(C) R
(D) Q
(E) K
Q27
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q and R are
sitting in a straight row but not in the same order.
Some of them are facing south and others facing
north direction. Not more than two adjacent
persons face in the same direction. J sits 4 from
one of the extreme ends. K sits 5 to the right of
J. Two persons sit between K and N and both K
and N are facing towards the north. One person
 
th
th
th
th

sits between N and P, who sits to the immediate
left of Q. R sits third to the right of P, who faces
south. O sits to the immediate left of both L and
J. M and R face the same direction.
 
Number of persons sitting to the right of ___ is
equal to number of persons sitting to the left
of J.
(A) L
(B) K
(C) N
(D) P
(E) None of these
Q28
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q and R are
sitting in a straight row but not in the same order.
Some of them are facing south and others facing
north direction. Not more than two adjacent
persons face in the same direction. J sits 4 from
one of the extreme ends. K sits 5 to the right of
J. Two persons sit between K and N and both K
and N are facing towards the north. One person
sits between N and P, who sits to the immediate
left of Q. R sits third to the right of P, who faces
south. O sits to the immediate left of both L and
J. M and R face the same direction.
 
R sits exactly between ___ and ___.
(A) N – Q
(B) J – N
(C) O – Q
(D) Both a) and b)
(E) Both b) and c)
Q29
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons J, K, L, M, N, O, P, Q and R are
sitting in a straight row but not in the same order.
Some of them are facing south and others facing
north direction. Not more than two adjacent
persons face in the same direction. J sits 4 from
one of the extreme ends. K sits 5 to the right of
J. Two persons sit between K and N and both K
and N are facing towards the north. One person
sits between N and P, who sits to the immediate
left of Q. R sits third to the right of P, who faces
south. O sits to the immediate left of both L and
J. M and R face the same direction.
 
Who sits fourth to the left of N?
(A) J
(B) K
(C) L
(D) M
(E) P
Q30
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons viz. A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H and I are
sitting in a linear row such that all of them are
facing north, but not necessarily in the same
order.
B sits second to the left of E. Only two persons sit
between B and I who sit at one of the extreme
ends of the row. Three persons sit between G
and D who sits second to the left of C. E sits third
to the right of G. H sits in the middle of the row. F
sits second to the left of B. A sits third to the
right of H.
 
Who among the following sits second to the right
of I?
(A) G
(B) E
(C) A
(D) C
(E) F

B sits second to the left of E. Only two persons sit

ends of the row. Three persons sit between G
and D who sits second to the left of C. E sits third
to the right of G. H sits in the middle of the row. F
 
th
th
th
th

sits second to the left of B. A sits third to the
right of H.
 
Which of the following statement(s) is/are true
with respect to the final arrangement?
(A) G is not an immediate neighbour of F
(B) A sits second to the left of E
(C) C sits third to the right of E
(D) I is an immediate neighbour of G
(E) None is correct

order.
B sits second to the left of E. Only two persons sit

(A) 2
(B) 3
(C) 4
(D) 5
(E) None of these
Q33
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons viz. A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H and I are
sitting in a linear row such that all of them are

order.
B sits second to the left of E. Only two persons sit

the left of F?
(A) I
(B) B
(C) E
(D) G
(E) No one
Q34
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
Nine persons viz. A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H and I are
sitting in a linear row such that all of them are
facing north, but not necessarily in the same
order.
B sits second to the left of E. Only two persons sit

Four of the following five are alike in a certain
way and hence form a group. Which of the
following does not belong to that group?
(A) IG
(B) BE
(C) EA
(D) DC
(E) GB
Q35
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine persons- A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, and I are
sitting in the linear row facing the north but not
necessarily in the same order. H sits third to the
left of G. Only one person sits between H and B.
B sits to the left of H. A sits two places away to
the right of F. A and G are not immediate
neighbours. H does not sit adjacent to F. D sits to
the left of E and to the right of C. C sits to the
right of B. Only one person sits between G and I,
who is not an immediate neighbour of H . D is in
the right of C but not immediate right.

How many persons are seated to the left of D?
(A) None
(B) Three
(C) Four
(D) Five
(E) Six
Q36
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine persons- A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, and I are
sitting in the linear row facing the north but not
necessarily in the same order. H sits third to the
left of G. Only one person sits between H and B.
B sits to the left of H. A sits two places away to
the right of F. A and G are not immediate
neighbours. H does not sit adjacent to F. D sits to
the left of E and to the right of C. C sits to the
right of B. Only one person sits between G and I,
who is not an immediate neighbour of H . D is to
the right of C but not immediate right.
How many persons sits between I and F?
(A) None of these
(B) One
(C) Two
(D) Three
(E) Four
Q37
Directions: Study the following data carefully
and answer the questions accordingly.
Nine persons- A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, and I are
sitting in the linear row facing the north but not
necessarily in the same order. H sits third to the
left of G. Only one person sits between H and B.
B sits to the left of H. A sits two places away to
the right of F. A and G are not immediate
neighbours. H does not sit adjacent to F. D sits to
